_data.text:
Contributing content
--------------------

To add a new map:
- Create a file named "mapname.json" `in website/content/`
- Add the mapname to the list in `website/content/meta.json`
- Images that you refence in your files need to be placed in `website/assets/image/`

Refer to other maps for the expected structure of mapname.json.
If you are unfamiliar with json notation/syntax, I recommend using a json editor to validate your contribution https://codebeautify.org/online-json-editor

The JSON crash course:
----------------------

- A json object is delimited by `{}`.
- Objects have properties. Each property has a name and value.
```
{
  "propertyname1": "propertyvalue1",
  "propertyname2": "propertyvalue2"
}
```
- Name/value pairs are linked by `:`.
- Properties are separated by a `,`.
- The property name is always a string, delimited by `""`.
- The property value can have different types. Here, we only use strings `""`, arrays `[]` and objects `{}`.

- An array contains multiple values. Values are separated by `,`.
```["item1", "item2", "item3"]```

That's all there is to it, you can combine these simple things to achieve more complex structures
```
{
  "prefix": "cp",
  "name": "process",
  "thumbnail": "cp_process.jpeg",
  "description": "Lorem, ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit.",

  "versions": [{
    "suffix": "f9",
    "download": "https://tf2maps.net/downloads/refresh-cp_process.9042/download?version=32201",
    "date": "12/30/2020",
    "changes": [{ "type": "fix",
                  "message": "The change message." },
                { "type": "improved",
                  "message": "The change message." },
                { "type": "revert",
                  "message": "The change message." },
                { "type": "custom",
                  "message": "The change message." }]
  }, {
    "suffix": "f8",
    "download": "",
    "date": "12/30/2020",
    "changes": [{ "type": "fix",
                  "message": "The change message" }]
  }]
}
```

Note: do not put a `,` after the last property of an object or the last item of an array, this is invalid. It will happen to you with enough copypasta.

_data.name: borneo
_data.description: This version of pl_borneo has hundreds of small changes which significantly improve competitive suitability.
_data.originalAuthorsComment: The original map pl_borneo was made by Sean "Heyo" Cutino and Matt "vhalin" Leahy.

changes.message: Optimization
The clipping around the beams in garage.
The lip above the controlpoint-barn by making it non-solid.
Chickenwire beneath the staircase next to corn.
Chickenwire to the picket-fences surrounding the map.
Chickenwire to the track side of the barn.
Chickenwire underneath the shed outside of blue spawn.
Clipping the bridge before garage outside third.
Clipping to the windows on last.
Glass to all the servers props so they act like a flat wall on last.
Collision all railing and replace the collision mesh with clip brushes.
Collision on all pipes.
Lamp solidity; some in last still collide with players.
Solidity from the lights and added clipping to the underside of the catwalks.
The holes in the wooden fences along the bridge and cliff.
Clipped between the nodes along the fence on the left side on last.
Clipped the tunnel leading to third.
Closed off the box stack on the bottom floor.
Closed off under red spawn on last.
Closed off under the bridge on last.
Closed off under the platform on the left route on last.
Closed the gaps beneath stairs and blockbulleted them.

_data.name: metalworks
_data.description: In this edit of Metalworks we have aspired to keep things as close to vanilla as possible with hundreds of small edits to clipping and prop placement. Our main target was to correct a lot of the loose decoration around the map commonly used as obstacles or cover by adding block bullet brushes to the afformention stacks or replacing them with brush made structures. Finally the geometry of the last point has been improved to match the visuals, in original Metalworks players may struggle with combat around the paint as props are used to build up rickity ramps, in Refresh we have adjusted this to be a brush ramp allowing fights to be much more clean.
_data.originalAuthorsComment: The original map cp_metalworks was made by Ian "ScorpioUprising" Cuslidge.

changes.message: Splash damage through the metal structure around last point.
The arrow signs near dropdown to be mirrored.
The shutter on Blue Second not fully opening.
Movement and collision around propstacks.
Replaced the clipbrush behind the trucks on mid with blockbullets
Replaced the clipbrushes around the last point with solid visible brushes.
Solidity from the heads of all the tall lightposts around the map.
Filled decorative holes in most ceilings.
Filled in most minor gaps (such as windows and between vents) with block bullet brushes.
Filled in problematic gaps under ramps.
Made all decorative support beams nonsolid.
Made all overhead lights nonsolid.
Raised all packs to be 8 hammer units off the ground.
Compiled the map using Fubar's BSPreveal.

_data.name: process
_data.description: We aimed to keep the map structure and appearance as close to the original as possible with over a hundred changes being completely invisible, for example player clips and blockbullet brushes. The main target of these changes were improved collision on steps, slopes, doorways, ceilings and props, predominantly where splash bugs occurred. Some examples of this are on top of the crates on mid, the concrete ledges leading up to the grass area on mid, player collision fixes on doorways so you cannot get stuck and finally the geometry of the last point has been improved to match the visuals, pipes only collide with stickies and grenades, thus rocket jumping should be facilitated.
_data.originalAuthorsComment: The original map, cp_process, was made by Ian "ScorpioUprising" Cuslidge.

changes.message: One of the improved rock models used around the second points has been found to crash some configs and has been replaced.
A tiny positional difference between the platforms above the two last points has been fixed.
Decals missing from last point areas have been added back.
Reflective surfaces have better cubemap allocations.
The change message
Compiled with BSPReveal.
Corrected rotation of rocks on mid
The crack between mid crates by mirroring crate heights.
Added Fubar's new rock collision meshes.
Added player clipping to the mid rocks in the corner near sewer, so that they feel smooth-ish like the old ones.
Modified spawn floors to use correct cubemaps.
Minor collision fixes to windows near the second points.
Minor texture alignment fixes around 2nd and choke.
Clipping on lobby computer and printer.
Redid the clipping on the large prop above IT, but it remains imperfect.
Player collision around the enemy spawn door.
Health and ammo pack heights are now consistently 8u - they were previously different for each side in some places.
Increased cubemap resolution of the windows on 2nd.
Out of bounds pipes on 2nd slightly poking through a wall.
Texture alignment on sewer 2nd.
Increased lightmap resolution on a few skinny vertical faces to resolve lighting errors.
Health and ammo overlay texture consistency.
Properly mirrored health and ammo pack layout on 2nd.
See-through gaps around windows on 2nd.
Rock poking through ground on 2nd.
Out-of-bounds displacement seams on mid by sewer.
Made the lights in lobby the same for both sides.
Added barrel props below the ramps to the top of last in order to improve projectile behaviour.
Prop layout by the left spawn doors.
Rotated barrel by red rollout to hide texture seam.
Extended mid fence by sewer to reach wall.
Further clipping improvements to the raised ledge area in lobby.
Minor change to position of wood pallet outside forwards (no longer intersects with team coloured concrete).
Minor improvement to shape of blockbullet on rock below rollout.
Rock blockbullet.
Shape and clipping of step thing behind last point.
Reduced size of clipping on diagonal pipe near choke.
Made light above lower lobby non-solid.
Added props to barrel corner near mid-IT entrance.
Brought back the out-of-bounds tower with a radar dish on blue 2nd.
Clipping on the side with the railing of the raised lobby area.
Added railing to the rooftop above the far sewer door.
Some texture alignment issues at last.
Some missing decals at last and lobby.
Decal bug under ammo packs.
Solidity of one of the doors at last.
Gave the ramps at last detailing.
Panic room clipping.
Sewer spytech clipping and blockbullets.
IT spytech blockbullets.
Made further improvements to playerclip above sewer.
Blockbullet at corner near choke.
Minor lobby blockbullet adjustments.
Collision on cylindrical prop above mid entrance to IT.
Added blockbullets to the last window next to the fence on the far left wall.
Simplified mid crate projectile collision.
Adjusted choke ammo pack to be above ground instead of above concrete.
Added minor player clipping to the mid barrels & fences for slightly smoother player movement.
Raised the skybox by 512 units.
Painted more invisible faces with nodraw.
Replaced the radar dish on blue side with a blue tower to match the red tower found on red side.
Spawn room chairs are more tucked in.
Made metal things in lower it ceiling func_illusionary.
Loads of clipping improvements.
Replaced playerclipping ramps on last with proper ramps (detailing is in progress).
Raised displacement edges adjacent to concrete on mid and second.
Projectile clipping on mid crates.
Additional minor clipping improvements.
Sticky collision to pipes in sewer and PC.
Sticky collision to lamps in top lobby and nest.
Clipping ramps to the rock underneath rollout.
Many more player and projectile clipping improvements.
All doorways besides the second forward spawns have been made tall enough for a jumping player to go through.
The lowest doorways have been raised to above the height of a jumping player.
Stairs have been given proper projectile collision.
Minor prop asymmetry issues have been resolved.
The clipping on the walls of last has been removed to match the size of the playable space to the size of the room.
Props and corners have been given smooth player collision.
Surfaces not visible to players have been removed to reduce the map filesize and potentially increase framerate.
Lamps no longer collide with players.
The circular structures above the mid entrances to PC have better player collision.
Areas around the mid crates have much better player and projectile collision.
Player collision with overhanging roofs and small concrete steps.

_data.name: steel
_data.description:
Steel is a classic highlander map beloved by most, but is not without its flaws. 
Being a map from 2008 Steel really starts to show its age from unclipped stairs through to cluttered props and chokey corridors. In this project we have aimed to fix issues with map geometry as well as minor aesthetic and performance improvements while also adjusting some of the layout for a more modern TF2.
_data.originalAuthorsComment: The original map cp_steel was made by Jamie "Fishbus" Manson, Dan "Irish Taxi Driver" Merboth and FLOOR_MASTER.

changes.message: Collision on all Red Spawn shutters, The clipping on the staircase in Death Corridor and some miscellaneous textures that were incorrectly alligned throughout the map.
The rockwall in the connector from Lobby/Whiteroom to D.
Block bullets to the front of the metal shed on A and Clipbrushes to the dirt around B.
Being able to shoot through the red spawn doors.
Texture misalignment near the trolly in white room.
Increased Damage of Kill Triggers (500 -> 1000) to prevent exploit of overhealed FoS Heavy on E.
Merged all kill triggers into one in the bottom of the pit on E.
Made all chickenwire textures the same size and rotation to maintain consistency.
Adjusted the ladder leading to the top of the shack on B.
Changed the clipping on the planks in the house on highground to a blockbullet on B.
Removed solidity from the lamp in the house on highground on B.
Smoothed out the ground around the small ammopack near the truck on B.
Flipped the lantern in Red dropdown on B.
Added the arches back near the resupply cabinets in blue spawn.
Replaced all patch overlays under health and ammo with func_illusionary ones so they are always visible.
Adjusted the glass in front of the rock wall (will be updating this detail further in a future version) in white room.
Compiled using Fubar's BSPreveal.
Small update to fix an oversite related to pit related deaths causing players to die as soon as they respawn.
Clipping the A - Whiteroom/Lobby connector.
Replaced the chickenwire on E with metalgrate texture to fit better thematically.
Reworked Blu's spawns so that now players spawn an equal distance from each other and with a better chance of having a good spawn.
Pyro being able to shoot through the door on A as well as most projectiles and hitscan being able to shoot through the sides.
Clipping on some overhead props in BEC and C.
Removed solidity from all railings.
Adjusted some texture work on B and D to limit the amount of chicken wire used throughout the map.
Made the staircase on C and the full hp house on A on grid.
Finally added cubemaps.
Fixed a lot of clipping.
Restarted the project to realign focus.
Removed almost every gameplay change.
Tidied up some previous changes.
Added textures to the tops of out of bound buildings.
Adjusted metal beams to help movement.
Replaced the chickenwire floor near redspawn with wood.
Removed solidity on the lamp in D+E connector (replaced this hiding spot with a ledge).
Fixed some props sticking through walls on D.
Fixed some weird floating props in Whiteroom.
Fixed some Z-Fighting on one of the doorframes in red spawn.
Fixed the black brushes in the main exit in blue spawn.
Fixed the weird black brushes outside the play area on C.
Adjusted the pipe outside of the play area to visually fit the theme better on C.
Changed the woodplank to a ramp and extended the stairs on the porch to make movement more fluid around the area on B.
Corrected clipping outside Blue spawn's windows on A.
Corrected some incorrect textures in blue spawn.
Corrected some incorrect textures on B.
The extended highground on B.
The sentry porch on B.
Collsion on decorative supports in Wishbone.
Collision on decorative supports on A.
Collision on decorative supports on B.
Collision on decorative supports on C.
The bridge and fence on the hill on A.
The last few remaining metal beams on D.
Made both sniper perch windows taller to prevent sentries being able to "headglitch" on E.
Compiled with HDR and LDR lighting.
Corrected clipping.
Better splash handling.
More player friendly movement.
Adjusted props to help with both visibility and gameplay.

_data.name: upward
_data.description:
Upward is generally the first map most players think of when someone mentions the payload gamemode. 
Being a major staple of both competitive and casual this map is beloved by all but its not without its flaws. Being released in 2010, upward has aged poorly with its clipping issues, unconventional mapping techniques and abundance of holes. Refresh has corrected all of this while still maintaining the same map we all love.
_data.originalAuthorsComment: The original map pl_upward was made by Valve.

changes.message: Misaligned fire extinguisher on last.
Support beams on last upper no longer bounce stickies.
Overlay ammo patch in dropdown/window second.
Replaced clipbrushes with blockbullets in: backstairs last, balcony/window second, house second-third, dropdown/banana last, spiral last, b house second.
Changed cabinet in spawn to no longer have shadows and prevent doors clipping out
Being able to cap/deny cart from under rollercoaster on 3rd.
Clipping around first point under playground and blue side of the cliff-bridge.
Clipping in spiral.
Clipping around metal vertical beams and curbs under point on last.
Clipping under heavy balcony on third.
Splash around first-tunnel entrance wall.
Sign behaviour around the map to avoid solidity/visibility issues.
Gap between the wood and dirt on First.
Floating windows and boards above Second.
Remaining bush on flank side of First.
New hiding spot along Blue base.
New hiding spot above First.
Attached a lightswitch wire to the ceiling on Third.
Replaced all patch overlays under health and ammo with func_illusionary ones so they are always visible.
Lighting around last should reflect how it is in default upward now.
Readded a bunch of missing decals.
Raised ceiling bar on red last to make movement smoother.
Various clipping and block bullet changes behind and around props.
Lighting on rock models.
Pop-in on specific props.
Adjusted Bloom and hdr exposure settings.
Removed a lot of exploits (including: resup binding on enemy spawn doors, shooting into blue spawn from third, getting stuck on signs and being able to build in the dropdown).
Corrected clipping.
Better splash handling.
Closing off of a LOT of holes.
Reworked decorative props and brushwork to be more in line with the competitive format.
The box gap on last.
Compiled with BSPReveal.

_data.name: warmtic
_data.description: Warmtic has been around a while in Highlander but we noticed it was getting quite low reviews from players in ETF2L's last poll. Most changes you'll see here aim to only improve gameplay, not change. Most hiding/perch spots have been left in.
_data.originalAuthorsComment:
The original map koth_arctic was made by Hannes "Hanz" Tirez. 
The original map koth_warmtic was made by "Popcorp". 
The control point skin was made by "Alistor".

changes.message: Thinned the pillars outside near the dropdown.
Changed the invisible displacements to blockbullets.
Changed some of the playerclips to blockbullets.
Brightened up some light around the pillars near the dropdown.
Changed the clipping on the pillars near the point to help with splash.
Compiled using Fubar's BSPreveal.
An issue with the point activation voice lines.

Made a few props non-solid.

A hole in the fence on BLU side by the window.

Minor visual tweaks.
Many of the light poles in the spawn areas.

Restarted the project to realign focus.

The clipping on some of the unusuable doors.

Filled hole in truck in the courtyard.

Texture bugs on mid.
All stairs have been given blockbullets
Cleaned up balcony.
Cleaned up dropdown, its still just as dangerous but you won't get stuck in crouch.
